G

getCoordinateType() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getYProperty returns the property key of the Y property.
getcostProperty() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
Gets the value of the property costProperty.
getDirection() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getDirection returns the direction of Relationship which aStar should traverse.
getEnd() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getEnd returns the id of the end node.
getlonProperty() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
Gets the value of the property lonProperty.
getName() - Method in class proceduretest.ExpanderRestriction
The Method getName returns the name(property key) of the property which is checked if it fulfills the restriction.
getnodeProperties() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getnodeProperties returns the restrictions for the Node properties.
getOperator() - Method in class proceduretest.ExpanderRestriction
The Method getOperator returns value of the restriction.
getRelationshipTypes() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getRelationshipTypes returns the names of the relationship types.
getrelProperties() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getrelProperties returns the the restrictions for the Relationship properties.
getStart() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getStart returns the id of the start node.
getValue() - Method in class proceduretest.ExpanderRestriction
The Method getValue returns the value of the restriction.
getXProperty() - Method in class proceduretest.Query
The Method getXProperty returns the property key of the X property.
graphService - Variable in class proceduretest.Query
